narrative: Hot US PPI and the confirmation of Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair drive a dollar rally — DXY +0.19%; USD/JPY firms to 157.82 as 300bp carry sustains the bid; gold higher +0.22%; equities +0.58%; VIX 17.9. AUD/JPY bilateral divergence dominates G8 themes (spread 1.531%) as RBA 4.35% vs BoJ 0.75% carry favors AUD. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27 for the next policy catalyst.
